title: Jupiter Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jupiter Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
